text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 252 

Warning indicator 8 ('duplicate indicator' derived from the presence of two claim records with the same 
claim number admission date, provider number, claim from/thru date, HCFA process date and query 
code; death/admission date indicator derived by comparing the admission date on the final claim(s) that 
comprise the stay to the beneficiary death date): 

0 = Do duplicate record 
1 = Duplicate
